name: Dr. Rajesh Pandey
bio: Dr. Rajesh Pandey runs the Cloud Engineering Lab where he studies architectural patterns for building resilient microservice systems. His group developed a chaos engineering platform that automatically injects network latency and service failures to validate resilience policies in production Kubernetes clusters. He has published a widely-cited taxonomy of microservice anti-patterns derived from mining 2,000 open-source repositories. His ongoing work on carbon-aware workload scheduling in multi-cloud environments won the Green Computing Award at ICSE.
